title: serratula alpina
intro: Serratula alpina, also known as Alpine Burnet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, burns, and skin irritations, thanks to its healing and soothing properties. Serratula alpina can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or salves, which are often used to aid in the treatment and management of these conditions.
